calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Construing Trust Instrument, And Instructing Trustee
Off Calendar Nov-29-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Carolyn Espy for Jules Roscom (Petitioner).

The Court stated that notice was proper, that there was no opposition filed by neither of the two residual Beneficiary Charities and granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
